caption: A man with blonde hair, glasses, and a mustache wears white headphones and a dark blue t-shirt while sitting in a room with a light-colored wall and a decorated Christmas tree. He is speaking and smiling, with a microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a framed picture featuring the number "20". As the scene progresses, the view shifts to a broadcast of an American football game in a stadium. The game overlay shows "2nd & 8", a score of "14" and "7", the team abbreviation "EXO", the period "3rd", and a clock at "2:19" with ":24" remaining. The stadium features green grass, red seating, and a large "FedEx" logo on a building. A small inset window in the corner of the football broadcast continues to show the man in the room, maintaining his position and appearance.
